picks.final_take: Use underneath, not my winner, also there are better horses
picks.writeup:
Decently heavily raced horse with 7, but hasn’t finished worse than 2nd all across some highly graded races
She took off the major prep races to rest for the Oaks
She was starting to get caught by Counting Stars at the end of the Honeybee and if it were at the longer Oaks track she would have been caught.
Baffert and Flavien Pratt combo is strong. But we must defeat Bob.

picks.final_take: Definitely will hit the board. Will be a question if she hits her stride quick enough on the straightaway
picks.writeup:
Many people are high on this horse and I think she is just as good as Percy’s Bar who she just lost to, solely because she had to work through a tougher trip
In each of the past couple of races what gives me pause is that she showed green tendencies at the start of the last stretch which takes too long to get her into her impressive downhill momentum
Already won a race (Demoiselle) at the 1 1/8 mile distance impressively
Not needing a huge write up. Got beat pretty good by Counting Stars in last prep and doesn’t have many impressive wins

picks.final_take: interesting at this price, may use up top for win contention
picks.writeup:
Very visually impressive win in the Fantasy pressing the pace and taking over just to then extend her lead down the stretch
Relatively heavily raced horse with 7 under her belt – she probably was an average horse until the major step up in the Fantasy
She lost to Explora in the race prior after trying to chase her down but ran out of real estate and lost by a neck
She broke her maiden at Churchill downs and should only do better with the added distance

picks.final_take: Improving horse who keeps winning. She has the potential to win
picks.writeup:
Very good record across 5 starts with mostly improving ratings each time
Didn’t blow competition away at any point but looked strong in each race
Great post draw in the 5 hole

Led the majority of the race before getting caught in the straightaway in last prep
Will likely set the pace in the Oaks
Doubtful she will fend off the difficult field coming up

picks.final_take: not worth a bet. Leave out completely with value in other horses
picks.writeup:
Very lightly raced (twice) but won them both
I don’t think she looked very impressive at all last race I don’t know why she would be going off below 10-1
She only won the Gazelle because Pashmina couldn’t run any further

Looked strong in the prep race coming around from slightly off the lead and easily winning down the stretch. The distance doesn’t look like it will be an issue
Very lightly raced horse with only three outings, all of which in the 2026 campaign – good results in each, including wins in latest two
This does create some unknowns though with how to compare against the field
Good trainer x jockey combo with Brad Cox and Javier castellano
Improved speed ratings in each outing. Another step up would give real chance

picks.final_take: Not in love with her. The Bar needs a new bartender. Odds are too high to even use in exotics lets make money elsewhere
picks.writeup:
Strong unscathed race riding the rail the entire way in the Ashland, though didn’t have to endure any stress which will inevitably occur in the larger Oaks field
Only had this one race in 2026 season so far after coming off of three 2nd/3rds in the fall

picks.final_take: She took a big step in ratings wise in last prep and will have to do so again, but likely leaving her off tickets.
picks.writeup:
Was hoping to find an overlooked horse here with Bella B since she lost her prep race with it being to a horse who she wont have to deal with in this Oaks race
Bella B took the lead early and looked strong up front the entire race and destroyed everyone but Life of Joy, who looked even better down the stretch
Oaks is 1/16 mile futher than the Fair Grounds Oaks which is a tough sell after she just lost the lead in the shorter race
Unfortunately for comparison purposes, all other races she pretty much beat the same horses each time so not much variety. And Life of Joy got beat pretty good by Zany in her prior outing. This quick math tells us Zany is a tier above Mrs. B

picks.last_race: 2nd Gazelle G3 to Always a Runner
picks.final_take: ran out of gas last race, itll happen again. Toss
picks.writeup:
Barely got caught by Always A Runner who is taking a lot of money in the Oaks, although it was because Pashmina ran completely out of gas at the end
It will take much more energy in the Oaks to navigate the larger field since coming from the 13 hole and will almost definitely re run out of gas

picks.last_race: 2nd Santa Anita Oaks G2 to Meaning
picks.final_take: Aside from her Blondness I have to draw the line on the bad post draw
picks.writeup:
Didn’t really get that outrun by Meaning who I have as a win contender
Lightly raced horse who has improved while adding distance
First time traveling outside of Cali
There isn’t enough for me to get too excited about Miss Blondie but I don’t see any real red flags
Issue will be trying to get to the lead from the far out post which I don’t see her doing

picks.final_take: No reason why her first win in 8 months would be in the Kentucky Oaks. Only use in the 4-spot underneath in a trifecta if you want to juice a return
picks.writeup:
Almost overcame a difficult trip in last race having to run way out wide to get around traffic and still almost ran down the leader
Will have to transition from synthetic dirt though for the Oaks which provides a question mark
Hasn’t won since breaking her maiden in August
Has improved figures each time but she’s only raced on grass or synthetic dirt each time
She isn’t always be closing. A 2nd or 3rd place merchant.
